  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rafatus Lehgerus sapulzi- 
najſchi Aweta/ nn Isra- 
els apmettehs pee Jesreêta Akfas."
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un to Wilisteru Leeli-Kun- 
gi gahje us turren pa ſimteem un 
pa tuhkſtoſcheem. Bet Dahwids 
un winna Wihrí gahje ar Akisú 
no pakkatenes."
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija to Wilisteru 
Leeli-Kungi: Par ko irr ſchee Ee- 
breeri? Tad fazzija Akis us to 
WilisteruLeeleem-Kungeem:Neg- 
gi ichis irr Dahwids/ Saula 
Kalps/ ta Rehnixa no Israêka/ 
tas ſchinnis Deenas jeb ſchinnis 
Gaddòs pee man irr bijis/ un es 
pee ta ne eſmu ne neeka atraddis 
no tahs Deenas/ ka winſch tur irr 
atkahpis/ lihds ſchodeen?"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet to Wilisteru Leeli- 
Kungi apſkaitahs pahr winnu/ 
un tee Wilisteru Leeli-Kungi faz- 
zija us to: Lai tas Wihrs atgree- 
schaſs/ ka winſch atpakkat eet us 
fawn Weetu/ ko tu winnam eſti 
noderwis/ laid winſch ne eet ar 
muns Karrá/ ka winſch mums 
ne tohp par Prettineeku paſcha 
Raſchana. Un ka warretu ſchis 
fawain Kungam labbaki patieſt/ 
ka zaur ſcho Wihtu Galwahnt?"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Neggi ſchis irr tas Dah- 
wids/ no ka ar Stabulehm dsee- 
dahts tappe/ un fazzihfs: Sauls 
irr tuhkſtoſchus kawis/ bet Dah- 
wids definitstu hkſtoſchus?"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad aizinaja Akis to Dah- 
widu/ un fazzija us to: Tik tee- 
ſcham ka tas KUNGS dshwo:"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu eſti weens taiſns Wihrs/ un 
tawa Iſeeschanaun Ee-Eefchand 
pee mannis eeſch Lehgera man 
labbi patihk/ jo es pee tevis ne 
eſmu ſaunu atraddis/ no tahs 
Deenas/ kad tu pee man nahzis 
lihds ſchodeen/ bet teem Leeleem- 
Kungeem tu ne eſti patihkams."
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad atgrecees/ un eij ar 
Meern/ ka tu ſaunu ne darri 
preeſch to Wilisteru Leelo-Kun- 
gu Azzim."
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Dahwids us 
Akisu: Bet ko eſmu es darrijs/ 
un ko eſti tu pee tawa Kalpa at- 
raddis no tahs Deenas/ kad es 
tawa Preeſcha bijis/ lihds ſcho- 
deens ka man uu ne buhs eet un 
karruht prett teem Eenaidnee- 
keem manna Kunga/ ta Rehnixa?"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Akis/ un 
fazzija us Dahwidu: Es ganu 
sinnu/ teefcham tu eſtimannahm 
Azzim labbi patizzigs/ ta patt ka 
weens Deewa Engelis. Bet to 
Wilisteru Leeli-Kungi irr fazzij- 
fchi: Laid winſch ne eet ar mums 
Karrá."
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad zellees riht agri/ 
ar tawa Kunga Kalpeem/ kas ar 
teiv irr nahluſchi/ un tad buhteet 
rihtu zehluſchees/ un Gaifma 
buhs tappufi/ tad warreſeet 
no-eet."
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs Dahwids 
ar farveem Wiheem agri/ ka 
tee atpakkat eetn us to Wilisteru 
Semuni. Bet tee Wilisteri zehlehſ 
nhs Jesreêln. 
Eeee"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
